mapper.select: select id, openid, unionid, source, game_type, nickname, avatar_url, created_at, updated_at from `user` where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into `user` ( openid, unionid, source, game_type, nickname, avatar_url, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{openid}, #{unionid}, #{source, jdbcType=INTEGER, typeHandler=com.sniper.game.wordgame.typehandler.SourceEnumTypeHandler}, #{gameType, jdbcType=INTEGER, typeHandler=com.sniper.game.wordgame.typehandler.GameTypeEnumTypeHandler}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, now(), now() )
mapper.update: update `user` set nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
